prompt: A vibrant, cute 3D claymation-style illustration of a retro yellow desktop computer setup on a desk. The central yellow CRT monitor displays a teal screen with the {argument name="OS logo text" default="Microsoft Windows 98"} logo and 7 desktop icons labeled 'My Computer', 'Online Services', 'My Documents', 'Outlook Express', 'Internet Explorer', 'Connect to the Internet', and 'Recycle Bin', plus a bottom taskbar with a 'Start' button and a clock reading '5:49 PM'. The monitor has a yellow sticky note reading '{argument name="monitor sticky note" default="Be Happy"}' and a small yellow bird perched on top. The computer base is labeled 'CREATIVE PC'. In front is a yellow mechanical keyboard labeled 'KBD-98' with orange and cream keys, and a yellow mouse labeled 'MS'. To the left is a green desk lamp, a smiling potted cactus, a blue floppy disk labeled '{argument name="floppy disk label" default="FUN STUFF"}', and a blue mug reading '{argument name="mug text" default="COFFEE TIME!"}' with a smiley face. To the right are 2 stacked books (green 'WINDOWS 98 MANUAL', blue 'INTERNET EXPLORER') and 2 smiling balloons (orange and yellow). The foreground features a green cutting mat, a yellow pencil, a green tape dispenser labeled 'TAPE IT!', 2 crayons, a pink sticky note reading 'Take a Break!', and a white notepad with a 5-item 'TO DO LIST': '1. Be Awesome', '2. Play More', '3. Call Mom', '4. Eat Snacks', '5. Smile :)'. The background wall has a green and cream clock, a white poster reading '{argument name="poster text" default="HAVE A NICE DAY!"}' with a smiling sun and 'Do Your Best!', and 3 additional sticky notes: a yellow one reading 'Dream Big Work Hard!', a pink one reading 'You've Got This!', and a green one reading 'Meeting 10:00 AM!'.
translatedPrompt: 一张充满活力、可爱的 3D 黏土动画风格插图，展示了复古黄色台式电脑的桌面布置。中央的黄色 CRT 显示器屏幕呈青色，显示着 {argument name="OS logo text" default="Microsoft Windows 98"} 标志，以及 7 个桌面图标，分别标注为“My Computer”、“Online Services”、“My Documents”、“Outlook Express”、“Internet Explorer”、“Connect to the Internet”和“Recycle Bin”，底部任务栏带有“Start”按钮和一个显示“5:49 PM”的时钟。显示器上贴着一张黄色便签，写着“{argument name="monitor sticky note" default="Be Happy"}”，顶部停着一只黄色小鸟。电脑底座上标有“CREATIVE PC”。前方是一个黄色机械键盘，标有“KBD-98”，配有橙色和奶油色键帽，以及一个标有“MS”的黄色鼠标。左侧有一盏绿色台灯、一盆微笑着的仙人掌、一张标有“{argument name="floppy disk label" default="FUN STUFF"}”的蓝色软盘，以及一个写着“{argument name="mug text" default="COFFEE TIME!"}”并带有笑脸的蓝色马克杯。右侧有 2 本堆叠的书（绿色“WINDOWS 98 MANUAL”、蓝色“INTERNET EXPLORER”）和 2 个微笑着的气球（橙色和黄色）。前景包括一张绿色切割垫、一支黄色铅笔、一个标有“TAPE IT!”的绿色胶带座、2 支蜡笔、一张写着“Take a Break!”的粉色便签，以及一个白色记事本，上面有 5 项“TO DO LIST”：“1. Be Awesome”、“2. Play More”、“3. Call Mom”、“4. Eat Snacks”、“5. Smile :)”。背景墙上挂着一个绿色和奶油色的时钟，一张写着“{argument name="poster text" default="HAVE A NICE DAY!"}”的白色海报，上面画着一个微笑着的太阳和“Do Your Best!”字样，还有 3 张额外的便签：一张写着“Dream Big Work Hard!”的黄色便签、一张写着“You've Got This!”的粉色便签，以及一张写着“Meeting 10:00 AM!”的绿色便签。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古 3D 黏土动画风格桌面布置：生成一张高度精细、可爱的 3D 插图，展示带有可自定义文本元素的复古电脑桌面。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, retro]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
